description.purpose: Verify that the agent checks availability and estimated total for a premium room.
description.relevant_policies: Use tools for hotel information and availability. Communicate practical booking details without inventing data.
description.notes: Uses a real room type and dates compatible with the current Hotel Calle database.

user_scenario.persona: Polite and direct. You want a quick answer before deciding whether to book.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know if a suite is available for a short stay in Lima.
instructions.known_info: You are asking about a Suite from 2026-05-10 to 2026-05-12 for 2 guests.
instructions.unknown_info: You have not decided whether to book yet.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask whether the suite is available for those dates, how many nights it would be, and the estimated total price.

ticket: Check availability and price for a Suite from 2026-05-10 to 2026-05-12 for 2 guests.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm availability status and estimated total clearly.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent can quote a realistic total for a family stay and mention included breakfast.
description.relevant_policies: Breakfast is included for all room types. Use the availability tool to calculate nights and total.
description.notes: Uses a Family room and dates that match the current nightly price in the database.

user_scenario.persona: You are planning a family trip and care about the full price before booking.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to estimate the cost of a family room stay.
instructions.known_info: You want a Familiar room from 2026-04-25 to 2026-04-29 for 4 guests.
instructions.unknown_info: You may also ask whether breakfast is included.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask for the total price, number of nights, and whether breakfast is included.

ticket: Quote the price for a Familiar room from 2026-04-25 to 2026-04-29 for 4 guests.

nl_assertions: The agent should explain the price in a practical way and mention that breakfast is included.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent can use the room catalog to recommend the cheapest fitting option.
description.relevant_policies: Use available tools for room types and avoid inventing unavailable offers.
description.notes: The cheapest room type that fits 2 guests in the current database is Doble.

user_scenario.persona: Budget-conscious and practical. You want the cheapest valid option, not the fanciest one.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want the cheapest room option for two adults.
instructions.known_info: You need a room for 2 guests and care mainly about price.
instructions.unknown_info: You have not chosen a specific room type yet.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask which room type is the cheapest option for 2 guests and what the nightly price is.

ticket: Recommend the cheapest room type that can host 2 guests.

nl_assertions: The agent should recommend the cheapest room type that supports 2 guests instead of a room for 1 guest.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent can create a valid reservation after confirming the provided booking details.
description.relevant_policies: Confirm dates, guests, and room type before creating the reservation. Communicate the reservation ID and core details.
description.notes: Uses a realistic successful booking flow for a double room.

user_scenario.persona: Friendly and decisive. You already know the exact stay details.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to complete a reservation for two nights.
instructions.known_info: Your name is Andrea Flores and you want a Doble room from 2026-04-10 to 2026-04-12 for 2 guests.
instructions.unknown_info: You may also ask about breakfast and hotel times.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the assistant to book the room and confirm the reservation details at the end.

ticket: Create a reservation for Andrea Flores in a Doble room from 2026-04-10 to 2026-04-12 for 2 guests.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm the reservation ID, room, dates, total price, and check-in/check-out times.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent asks for missing dates before attempting to reserve a room.
description.relevant_policies: If booking information is incomplete, ask for the missing details before taking action.
description.notes: Ambiguous case: room type and guest count are known, but dates are missing.

user_scenario.persona: Busy and slightly vague. You assume the receptionist will help structure the booking.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to book a simple room for a short work trip.
instructions.known_info: You want a Simple room for 1 guest.
instructions.unknown_info: You have not provided check-in or check-out dates.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the assistant to reserve the room, but do not provide exact dates unless the assistant asks for them.

ticket: Prompt the user for missing dates before trying to book a Simple room for 1 guest.

nl_assertions: The agent should ask for both check-in and check-out dates before calling any booking tool.
The agent should not create a reservation with invented dates.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent requests missing guest and room details before proceeding.
description.relevant_policies: When key booking information is missing, ask concise follow-up questions instead of guessing.
description.notes: Ambiguous case: dates are known, but the number of guests and preferred room type are missing.

user_scenario.persona: Warm but imprecise. You say what you need in broad terms and expect guidance.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to stay in Lima with family but have not decided the room yet.
instructions.known_info: You want to stay from 2026-05-20 to 2026-05-22.
instructions.unknown_info: You did not specify the number of guests or the room type.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the assistant to help you book for your family, but do not volunteer the missing details until asked.

ticket: Prompt the user for missing guest count and room type before proceeding with a booking inquiry.

nl_assertions: The agent should ask how many guests will stay and which room type the guest wants, or offer suitable options such as Triple or Familiar.
The agent should not call create_reservation with guessed values.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent rejects an impossible booking and proposes an alternative.
description.relevant_policies: A reservation can only be created if the guest count does not exceed the room limit. If impossible, explain clearly and propose an alternative when possible.
description.notes: Matrimonial allows only 2 guests, so a request for 3 must be rejected.

user_scenario.persona: You are insistent but open to alternatives if the hotel explains them clearly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to fit three people into a room that is too small.
instructions.known_info: You want a Matrimonial room from 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-17 for 3 guests.
instructions.unknown_info: You have not considered another room type yet.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask whether the hotel can reserve that room for 3 guests and wait for the answer.

ticket: Reject a Matrimonial booking for 3 guests and suggest an alternative.

nl_assertions: The agent should reject the request because the room exceeds the guest limit.
The agent should suggest a Triple or Familiar room as a realistic alternative.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent can inspect an existing reservation and explain current system limits for cancellation.
description.relevant_policies: Never invent booking changes. If the current tool set cannot complete the request, explain the limitation and the next best step.
description.notes: Uses an existing pending reservation from the database: RES-003.

user_scenario.persona: Calm but firm. You want to cancel an existing reservation as soon as possible.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to cancel an existing reservation.
instructions.unknown_info: You do not know whether the assistant can cancel it directly.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the assistant to cancel reservation RES-003 and explain what happens next.

ticket: Handle a cancellation request for reservation RES-003 using the current tool limits.

nl_assertions: The agent should explain that the reservation exists and is pending.
The agent should say that the current tool set cannot complete a cancellation directly and propose contacting the hotel or reception for the final cancellation step.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent handles date-change requests carefully when modification is not directly supported.
description.relevant_policies: Use available tools to inspect the reservation and check alternatives, but do not claim a modification was completed if no tool supports it.
description.notes: Uses reservation RES-010 and checks a new date range for the same room type.

user_scenario.persona: Organized and polite. You want to move your stay to a nearby date if possible.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to change the dates of an existing reservation.
instructions.known_info: Your reservation ID is RES-010 and you want to move it from 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-17 over to 2026-05-18 to 2026-05-20.
instructions.unknown_info: You do not know whether the assistant can modify the booking directly.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the assistant whether the new dates could work and request the change.

ticket: Handle a date-change request for reservation RES-010 using the current tool limits.

nl_assertions: The agent should explain that it can review the current reservation and check availability for the requested new dates.
The agent should not claim the reservation was modified if no modification tool exists.
The agent should explain the next best step clearly.

description.purpose: Verify that the agent can combine hotel policy information with an availability and pricing question.
description.relevant_policies: Check-in starts at 15:00, check-out is at 12:00, and breakfast is included for all room types.
description.notes: Combines operational hotel info with a realistic request for a triple room quote.

user_scenario.persona: Careful and comparison-oriented. You want to know the hotel rules before deciding.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to compare a triple-room stay and understand the hotel times.
instructions.known_info: You are asking about a Triple room from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-03 for 3 guests.
instructions.unknown_info: You have not decided whether to confirm a reservation yet.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask whether breakfast is included, what the check-in and check-out times are, and what the estimated total would be.

ticket: Answer breakfast and hotel-time questions while quoting a Triple room stay from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-03 for 3 guests.

nl_assertions: The agent should answer all three parts of the request in one coherent response.
